reconciler_paper_artifact.note: ROOT-CAUSED + FIXED. The -$845 paper figure came from the reverse reconciler adopting alpaca_options_paper us_option legs as equity `adopted_orphan` trades (entry=underlying spot) then the local-PnL sweep pricing them with the equity formula (contract_value_usd=1.0). Adopted 18:47, closed 19:05. Fixed in #4858 (account_open_positions options-aware -> no equity adoption) + #4867 (sweep options-defer guard), both live in deployed sha 5a2db1f2 since ~20:08. Post-deploy: zero new options adoptions. Residual: Tier-2 cleanup of the ~8 phantom rows + 48h verify. Real-money closes unaffected (broker-truth).
